core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix command-center precision with high-stakes casino luxury.
Emotion First: The UI should feel like a high-end trading terminal. Tension, expertise, adrenaline.
Zoom in: Highlight 'Value Bet' signals and the 'Win Probability' gauge as the focal points.
Contrast: Pure white data points cutting through deep obsidian backgrounds. High-saturation tactical accents.
anti_patterns: NO center-everything disease; use asymmetrical grid tension.
NO generic gradients. Use flat/matte colors with 1px precise borders.

typography.font_strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist / Performance' Pairing. Strong Condensed Sans for high-impact numbers and headings, Geometric Sans for tactical body copy.

headings.usage: H1-H3, massive score metrics, and Value Badges.

body.usage: Body text, tables, labels, and chat messages.

mono.usage: Odds comparison, JSON output, data coordinates.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none font-black

colors.strategy: Deep Obsidian anchor with high-visibility tactical accents. Pure White for key data.

layout_spacing.strategy: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, data correlation, high scanability.

grid.base: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6

surfaces.cards: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] rounded-none md:rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col h-full

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider py-3 px-6 rounded-md hover:bg-blue-600 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-400 focus:outline-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#262626] text-white hover:border-white/50 transition-colors py-3 px-6 rounded-md

badges.value: bg-[#34C759]/10 text-[#34C759] border border-[#34C759]/50 text-xs font-mono uppercase px-2 py-1
badges.avoid: bg-[#FF3B30]/10 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/50 text-xs font-mono uppercase px-2 py-1

chat_box.container: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] rounded-lg h-full flex flex-col
chat_box.message_user: bg-[#1F1F1F] text-white p-3 rounded-md self-end max-w-[85%] text-sm
chat_box.message_ai: bg-transparent border-l-2 border-[#007AFF] pl-4 py-2 my-2 text-[#A3A3A3] text-sm

gauges_and_charts.win_probability: Use Recharts PieChart (half arc) or custom SVG. High contrast stroke from #FF3B30 (0) to #34C759 (100).
gauges_and_charts.risk_toggle: Tactical segmented control with sharp indicator, background #0A0A0A, active text #FFFFFF.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-in-up for dashboard widgets using Framer Motion.
motion.chart_drawing: Smooth path drawing animation for the edge meter and win probability gauge.

image_urls.description: Abstract tactical dark mode data visualization background. Use for the full app background overlay at 10% opacity with mix-blend-screen.
Cricket stadium night lights dark. Use for Match Selector thumbnails or live match headers.
Night cricket match with a large crowd at Narendra Modi Stadium. Use for high-stakes playoff match thumbnails.

icons.style: Regular or Fill (for active states). Sharp, clear, data-driven. Install via `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.

requirements: All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST implement the app in pure Dark Mode ONLY. No light mode toggle.
Use Javascript (.js/.jsx) for all components, do NOT use Typescript (.tsx).
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Select, Dialog, Tabs) but override styles to have max 8px radii and hard #262626 borders.
For the Win Probability Gauge, build an SVG-based semi-circle or use Recharts.
Implement the 'Consultant Dashboard' grid precisely using the grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 system. It must look like an elite trading terminal.
The Consultant Chat Box should be an anchored/sticky widget (e.g., right-hand sidebar taking col-span-3 or col-span-4).
Use pure white text for critical numbers, muted #A3A3A3 for labels.
Load Barlow Condensed and IBM Plex Sans via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
Do NOT use real images for player profiles unless available via generic avatar; use typography and high-contrast impact cards instead.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements strictly.
